title: The Dark Heart Inefection
description: A new shadowy infection emerges! Can you fend off the beasts?
body: A new Threat has emerged and you can hear the ditastant and steady thump thump thump of a heart beat. This mod adds a light infection to your world . you can prtect your self by wearing an imunity charm. One must be carful, lest one become an ifected monstrocity.
